helpers.name: resizeToFitScene
helpers.description: Resize a sprite to match the current scene dimensions.

helpers.name: createCropRectangle
helpers.description: Generate and apply a crop rectangle from width/height fractions.
helpers.code: const rect = new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(0, 0, texture.width * 0.5, texture.height * 0.5);\nsprite.setCrop(rect);

helpers.name: createPhysicsSprite
helpers.description: Create a physics sprite with world bounds enabled.

helpers.name: createPlayerMovement
helpers.description: Basic horizontal movement + jump handler with cursor keys.

helpers.name: cameraFollowPlayer
helpers.description: Set camera bounds and start following player.

helpers.name: createCoinOverlap
helpers.description: Collectible overlap callback with score update and destroy.

helpers.name: pulseTween
helpers.description: Apply repeating pulse tween to target object.
